system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.sp_create_mtl_request","body":"CREATE PROC [dbo].[sp_Create_MTL_Request] (@bophan nvarchar (MAX),
                                   @madonhang nvarchar (MAX),
                                   @masp nvarchar (MAX),
                                   @mayeucau nvarchar (MAX)
)
AS
   BEGIN
      --*** TỔNG SỐ LƯỢNG YÊU CẦU TRONG NGÀY HIỆN TẠI ***--
      SELECT bophan,
             madonhang,
             masp,
             mact,
             sum (cast (soluong_yeucau AS float)) soluong_yeucau_trongngay,
             sum (cast (soluong_danhan AS float)) soluong_danhan
        INTO #tbl_sum
        FROM tr_material_require_info WITH (NOLOCK)
       WHERE FORMAT (ngaytao, 'yyyy-MM-dd') = FORMAT (getdate (), 'yyyy-MM-dd')
             AND madonhang = @madonhang
             --AND masp = @masp
             AND bophan = @bophan
      GROUP BY bophan, madonhang, masp, mact
      --***   END   ***--

      --*** SỐ LƯỢNG YÊU CẦU THEO MÃ YÊU CẦU ***--
      SELECT bophan,
             madonhang,
             masp,
             mact,
             mota,
             quycach,
             dvt,
             soluong_yeucau,
             FORMAT (ngaytao, 'dd/MM/yyyy') ngaytao,
             nguoitao,
             loai_yeucau,
			 ghichu,
             mayeucau
        INTO #tbl_main
        FROM tr_material_require_info WITH (NOLOCK)
       WHERE mayeucau = @mayeucau
      --***   END   ***--

      SELECT khuvuc,
             madonhang,
             masp,
             tensp,
             mact,
             soluong_can,
             soluong_daxuat,
             soluong_conlai
        INTO #tbl_detail
        FROM tr_material_requirement
       WHERE khuvuc = @bophan AND madonhang = @madonhang --AND masp = @masp

      SELECT a.mayeucau,
             a.bophan,
             a.ngaytao,
             a.nguoitao,
             a.loai_yeucau,
			 a.ghichu,
             a.madonhang,
             a.masp,
             a.mact,
             a.mota,
             a.dvt,
             a.quycach,
             b.soluong_can,
             b.soluong_daxuat,
             b.soluong_conlai,
             a.soluong_yeucau
        INTO #tbl_main2
        FROM    #tbl_main a
             LEFT JOIN
                #tbl_detail b
             ON     a.bophan = b.khuvuc
                AND a.madonhang = b.madonhang
                AND a.masp = b.masp
                AND a.mact = b.mact

      SELECT a.mayeucau,
             dbo.getDeptFromCode (a.bophan) bophan,
             a.ngaytao,
             a.nguoitao,
             CASE 
				WHEN a.loai_yeucau = 'MAIN' THEN N'Hàng chính' 
				WHEN a.loai_yeucau = 'LOT' THEN CONCAT(N'Hàng bổ sung', ' : ', a.ghichu)
				WHEN a.loai_yeucau = 'OTHER' THEN N'Khác' 
			END loai_yeucau,
			 a.ghichu,
             a.madonhang,
             a.masp,
             a.mact,
             a.mota,
             a.dvt,
             IIF(a.quycach = '**', '', a.quycach) quycach,
             a.soluong_can,
             a.soluong_daxuat,
             a.soluong_conlai,
             ISNULL(b.soluong_yeucau_trongngay, 0) soluong_yeucau_trongngay,
             a.soluong_yeucau
        FROM #tbl_main2 a LEFT JOIN #tbl_sum b
       ON     a.bophan = b.bophan
             AND a.madonhang = b.madonhang
             AND a.masp = b.masp
             AND a.mact = b.mact
   END

","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_material_require_info","dbo.tr_material_requirement"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
